name: Gorilla
tagline: Online experiment builder for behavioral researchers with WebGazer integration
short_impression: Gorilla is a widely-adopted online experiment platform in cognitive neuroscience and psychology research. It offers an intuitive experiment builder with WebGazer eye tracking integration as a control component, allowing researchers to conduct remote studies with sophisticated experimental designs. The platform is known for its timing precision, extensive task templates, and robust participant management system.
privacy_notes: Data stored on Gorilla cloud infrastructure. GDPR compliant. Institutional data processing agreements available.
